stories.title: Aspen Acres Wildfire Smoke Safety — What COS Families Need to Do Now

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Wildfire smoke from the Aspen Acres Fire (85,580+ acres, 0% contained) is reaching Colorado Springs. Keep kids indoors. Close windows, run HEPA air purifiers, limit outdoor activity. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Air quality alert: if you're in Colorado Springs and can smell smoke, that's enough to keep kids inside. Opt for indoor play, run fans with HEPA filters, and hydrate well. Aspen Acres Fire still at 0% containment. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Wildfire Smoke Is Reaching Colorado Springs — Here's What Families Need to Do Right Now

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Aspen Acres Wildfire Smoke Safety

#### img-01a — Social (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A young child sitting by a closed window indoors, looking outside at a hazy, smoke-tinged sky. Warm interior lighting contrasts with the muted orange-gray outdoor haze. The child's expression is calm and curious. The window frame takes up the right side; the indoor space is cozy with soft textures. A HEPA air purifier sits in the background corner. Photorealistic style, shallow depth of field, warm amber and soft blue tones. Clean visual space in the bottom third with a light neutral floor or rug visible.

---

#### img-01b — Article Hero (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A wide view of a suburban neighborhood in Colorado under a hazy, smoke-tinged sky — yellow-orange atmospheric tint from wildfire smoke in the distance. A family home with closed windows and a quiet street. No people visible. Late afternoon light filtered through smoke haze gives the scene an eerie golden cast. Photorealistic style, realistic atmospheric perspective. Clean visual space in the bottom third with a sidewalk or grass foreground.

---

stories.title: Recall — Criblike Mattresses (Mengna, Amazon): ~118,000 Units, Entrapment and Suffocation Risk

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: ~118,000 Criblike crib mattresses (Amazon, 2023–2025, $20–$60). Too small for some play yards/cribs → deadly entrapment gap. Cut in half + photo to Criblike for a full refund. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: If you have a Criblike play yard mattress at home, stop using it now. About 118,000 units are recalled — mattress may not fit properly, leaving a dangerous gap. Check yours: models XCD-001, XCD-002, MNCL-001. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recalls ~118,000 Criblike Mattresses Sold on Amazon — What Parents Need to Know

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Criblike Mattresses Recall

#### img-02a — Social (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A close-up of a simple pack-and-play portable crib with a visible gap between the mattress edge and the crib mesh wall. Soft, neutral nursery setting — white walls, gentle natural light. No infant or child in the image. The gap between the mattress and the wall is clearly visible. Photorealistic style, soft and clean nursery aesthetic, muted white and beige tones. Clean visual space in the bottom third with a light-colored nursery floor visible.

---

#### img-02b — Article Hero (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A calm, organized nursery with a portable crib or mini-crib as the focal point. Soft natural light from a nearby window. The crib is empty. No infant or child. Clean modern nursery aesthetic — white and light wood tones, soft textiles. The mattress inside the crib has a visible slight gap at the edges. Photorealistic style, gentle and informative mood. Clean visual space in the bottom third with a light hardwood or neutral floor.

---

research.facts:
Criblike Mattresses (Mengna) Recall
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|
| CPSC recall of Criblike brand mattresses | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold by Mengna on Amazon.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| ~118,000 units recalled | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Models: XCD-001, XCD-002 (Pack-n-Play, ~38x26 inches) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Model MNCL-001 (mini-crib, ~38x24 inches) | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold May 2023 through September 2025 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Price range: $20–$60 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold exclusively on Amazon.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Hazard: undersized for certain play yards/cribs → entrapment gap | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Infant's face can press against mattress and side wall, blocking breathing | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Mini-crib model also fails mandatory mattress flammability standards | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: stop use immediately | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: cut mattress in half, photograph, email Criblike-service_2025@outlook.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: full refund provided | HIGH | cpsc.gov |

stories.title: Two Baby Lounger Recalls — Vevor and YGJT Products Pose Entrapment and Fall Hazards

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: TWO baby lounger recalls: Vevor (Amazon/Wayfair, ~$30, Nov 2024–Jan 2026) and YGJT (SHEIN, $18–$21, Jun–Aug 2025). Both have sides too low + foot openings too wide → entrapment. Stop use + destroy immediately. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: Got a Vevor or YGJT baby lounger? Stop using it. Vevor: recalling@vevor.com or 855-599-6320. YGJT: YGJTrecall@outlook.com. Both offer full refunds. These loungers don't meet infant sleep safety standards. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Two Baby Lounger Recalls: Vevor and YGJT Products Flagged for Entrapment and Fall Hazards

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Baby Lounger Recalls (Vevor + YGJT)

#### img-03a — Social (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
Two soft fabric baby loungers side by side on a clean white surface — one in a neutral earthy green pattern, the other in white and light blue with a cartoon rainbows and bears print. The loungers are empty. Studio-style flat lay, overhead or slight angle view, even lighting. Photorealistic style, clean white background. No infants or children. Clean visual space in the bottom third.

---

#### img-03b — Article Hero (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A baby lounger cushion on a light wood nursery floor, empty and unoccupied. Soft neutral nursery setting — light gray walls, natural daylight. The lounger has a simple foam pad and padded fabric bumper visible. Photorealistic style, soft Scandinavian nursery aesthetic, muted beige and gray tones. No infant or child in the image. Clean visual space in the bottom third.

---

research.facts:
Vevor Baby Loungers + YGJT Baby Loungers Recalls
**Vevor Baby Loungers:**
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|
| CPSC recall of Vevor Baby Loungers | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| ~237 units recalled | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold at VEVOR.com, Amazon.com, Wayfair.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold November 2024 through January 2026 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Price: ~$30 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Colors: snow deer, good night, forest friends (oval), forest friends (backpack), green | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Foam sleeping pad and padded bumpers with cloth cover, ribbon at one end | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Hazard: sides too low to contain infant | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Hazard: enclosed foot openings wider than allowed → entrapment | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Hazard: no stand → fall risk on elevated surfaces | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Contact: 855-599-6320, 9 AM–5 PM PT, Mon–Fri | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Contact: recalling@vevor.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Website: vevor.com/pages/vevor-baby-loungers | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: full refund | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
**YGJT Baby Loungers:**
| Fact | Confidence | Source |
|------|-----------|--------|
| CPSC recall of YGJT Baby Loungers | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold by YGJT Local Warehouse on SHEIN.com | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| ~2,500 units recalled | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Sold June 2025 through August 2025 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Price: $18–$21 | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Color: white and light blue with rainbows and bears | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Made of foam sleeping pad and padded bumpers with cloth cover | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Same hazards: sides too low, foot openings too wide, no stand | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: destroy product — cut foam, pad, and cover in half | HIGH | cpsc.gov |
| Remedy: email photos to YGJTrecall@outlook.com for full refund | HIGH | cpsc.gov |

article.headline: Free Family Events in Colorado Springs All July Long — Park and Rec Month Is Underway

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
COS Parks and Rec Month Free Events

#### img-04a — Social (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A vibrant outdoor scene in a park on a warm summer evening — families and children on green grass, trees in the background, soft golden hour light. The mood is celebratory and community-oriented: children running, adults relaxing on blankets, colorful summer clothing. No specific faces or recognizable individuals. Photorealistic illustration style, bright teal and coral warm summer palette. Clean visual space in the bottom third with green grass foreground.

stories.title: Back to School 2026 COS — D11, D20, and D49 What Families Need to Know

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: COS back-to-school is about 6 weeks away. D11 provides each K-8 student a supply starter kit. D49 staggered start: only K, 6th, and 9th grade attend on day one. D20 info: asd20.org/school-supplies #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting
x_posts.tweet_type: NEW STORY (new angle: multi-district prep guide with supply kit + staggered start details)

article.headline: Back to School 2026 in Colorado Springs — What D11, D20, and D49 Families Need to Know Now

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Back to School 2026 COS

#### img-05a — Social (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A neatly arranged set of school supplies on a light wood desk: pencils, notebooks, crayons, a backpack in the background, ruler, and scissors. Flat lay composition with soft natural lighting. Warm golden tones, clean and organized. No children or people in the image. Photorealistic style, back-to-school aesthetic. Clean visual space in the bottom third with a light desk surface.

Back to School 2026 COS

|------|-----------|--------|

| Back-to-school prep typically starts 4–6 weeks before first day | MEDIUM | kdvr.com, general guidance |
